description: Use nanobot from WeCom work chats.
requirements: WeCom app credentials and callback settings

setup.tryIt: Send a test message to the WeCom bot.
setup.summary: WeCom needs an AI bot ID and secret from the WeCom admin console.
steps: Create an AI bot in WeCom and choose API mode.
Copy the Bot ID and Secret into nanobot.
Save and enable WeCom, then send a test message.

botId.label: Bot ID
botId.help: Copy it from the WeCom AI Bot API mode page.

secret.label: Secret
secret.help: Keep the WeCom bot secret private.
